Model this problem as a Max-Heap (Priority Queue) of the gas station fuels you've passed but haven't used yet.
Drive past all stations you can reach with your current fuel. While driving past them, push their fuel capacity into the Max-Heap.
When you run out of fuel to reach the next station (or target), take fuel from the largest ignored station (from the top of the Max-Heap). Count this as one stop.
If the heap is empty and you still can't reach the target or next station, return -1.
